Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Relief from Sanctions issued on 8/25/2003 to Plaintiff's and Defendant's Counsel in the amount of $350.00 each and Plaintiff's joinder in Defendant's Motion are scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion and joinder is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions issued against defendant's and plaintiff's counsel are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)
